buffs.name: Strength
buffs.content:
Increases (Decreases) attack damage by X.
Notes: Negative Strength is possible.

buffs.name: Dexterity
buffs.content: Increases Block gained from cards by X.

buffs.name: Artifact
buffs.content: Negates X debuffs.

buffs.name: Block Next Turn
buffs.content: At the start of your next turn, gain X Block .

buffs.name: Draw Cards Next Turn
buffs.content: At the start of your next turn, draw X additional cards.

buffs.name: Energy Next Turn
buffs.content: Gain X additional next turn.

buffs.name: Focus
buffs.content:
Increases the effectiveness of Orbs by X.
Notes: Allows negative values.

buffs.name: Intangible
buffs.content:
Reduce all damage taken and HP loss to 1. Lasts for X turns.
Notes: Intangible is removed at the end of the enemy turn. The damage cap is raised to 5 if the attacker has The Boot.

buffs.name: Plating
buffs.content:
At the end of your turn, gain X Block . Plating is reduced by 1 at the start of your turn.
Notes: On enemies, Plating decreases by 1 per player per turn.

buffs.name: Retain Hand
buffs.content: Retain your Hand for the next X turns.

buffs.name: Thorns
buffs.content: When hit by an attack, deal X damage back.

buffs.name: Vigor
buffs.content: Your next Attack deals X additional damage.

buffs.name: Buffer
buffs.content: Prevent the next X times you would lose HP.

buffs.name: Clarity
buffs.content: At the start of your next X turns, draw 1 additional card.

buffs.name: Diamond Diadem
buffs.content: Enemies deal 50% less damage this turn.

buffs.name: Duplication
buffs.content: Your next X cards are played an extra time.

buffs.name: Flex Potion
buffs.content:
Gain X Strength until the end of this turn.
Notes: Temporary Strength Mechanically identical to Reptile Trinket , Setup Strike , Coordinate , and Feeding Frenzy

buffs.name: Gigantification
buffs.content: The next 2 Attacks you play deal triple damage.

buffs.name: Radiance
buffs.content: Gain additional for the next X turns.

buffs.name: Regen
buffs.content: At the end of your turn, heal X HP, then reduce Regen by 1.

buffs.name: Reptile Trinket
buffs.content:
Gain X Strength until the end of this turn.
Notes: Temporary Strength gained when a Potion is used. Mechanically identical to Flex Potion , Setup Strike , Coordinate , and Feeding Frenzy

buffs.name: Ritual
buffs.content:
At the end of its turn, gains X Strength .
Notes: Skips the first end-of-turn trigger when applied by an enemy.

buffs.name: Speed Potion
buffs.content:
Gain X Dexterity until the end of this turn.
Notes: Temporary Dexterity Mechanically identical to Anticipate and Helical Dart

buffs.name: Aggression
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, put X random Attacks from your Discard Pile into your Hand and Upgrade them for the rest of combat.

buffs.name: Barricade
buffs.content: Block is not removed at the start of your turn.

buffs.name: Colossus
buffs.content: You receive 50% less damage from Vulnerable enemies for X turns.

buffs.name: Corruption
buffs.content: Skills cost 0. Whenever you play a Skill, Exhaust it.

buffs.name: Crimson Mantle
buffs.content:
At the start of your turn, lose X HP and gain X Block .
Notes: Self-damage increases each time Crimson Mantle is applied.

buffs.name: Cruelty
buffs.content: Vulnerable enemies take an additional X% damage.

buffs.name: Dark Embrace
buffs.content: Whenever a card is Exhausted , draw X cards.

buffs.name: Demon Form
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, gain X Strength .

buffs.name: Drum of Battle
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, Exhaust the top X cards of your Draw Pile.

buffs.name: Feel No Pain
buffs.content: Whenever a card is Exhausted , gain X Block .

buffs.name: Flame Barrier
buffs.content: Whenever you are attacked this turn, deal X damage back.

buffs.name: Free Attack
buffs.content: Your next X Attacks cost 0 .

buffs.name: Guarded
buffs.content:
Take half damage from enemies. Removed if the Tank dies.
Notes: Applied to allies by the Tank power. The Tank player takes double damage instead.

buffs.name: Hellraiser
buffs.content: Whenever you draw a card containing "Strike", it is played against a random enemy.

buffs.name: Inferno
buffs.content:
At the start of your turn, lose X HP. Whenever you lose HP on your turn, deal X damage to ALL enemies.
Notes: Self-damage increases by 1 each time Inferno is applied.

buffs.name: Juggernaut
buffs.content: Whenever you gain Block , deal X damage to a random enemy.

buffs.name: Juggling
buffs.content:
Add X copies of the third Attack you play each turn into your Hand.
Notes: The copy counter resets each turn.

buffs.name: One-Two Punch
buffs.content:
Your next X Attacks are played an extra time this turn.
Notes: Removed at end of turn.

buffs.name: Pyre
buffs.content: Gain at the start of each turn.

buffs.name: Rage
buffs.content:
Whenever you play an Attack this turn, gain X Block .
Notes: Removed at end of turn.

buffs.name: Rupture
buffs.content:
Whenever you lose HP on your turn, gain X Strength .
Notes: HP loss from cards you play is batched and applied after the card resolves.

buffs.name: Self-Forming Clay
buffs.content:
Gain X Block next turn.
Notes: Triggers when your Block is cleared (reduced to 0). Removed after triggering.

buffs.name: Setup Strike
buffs.content:
Gain X Strength until the end of this turn.
Notes: Temporary Strength Mechanically identical to Flex Potion , Reptile Trinket , Coordinate , and Feeding Frenzy

buffs.name: Stampede
buffs.content: At the end of your turn, X random Attacks in your Hand are played against a random enemy.

buffs.name: Tank
buffs.content: Take double damage from enemies. Allies take half damage from enemies.

buffs.name: Unmovable
buffs.content: The first X times you gain Block from a card each turn, double the amount gained.

buffs.name: Vicious
buffs.content: Whenever you apply Vulnerable , draw X cards.

buffs.name: Accelerant
buffs.content: Poison is triggered X additional times.

buffs.name: Accuracy
buffs.content: Shivs deal X additional damage.

buffs.name: Afterimage
buffs.content: Whenever you play a card, gain X Block .

buffs.name: Anticipate
buffs.content:
Gain X Dexterity until the end of this turn.
Notes: Temporary Dexterity Mechanically identical to Speed Potion and Helical Dart

buffs.name: Blade of Ink
buffs.content: Whenever you play an Attack this turn, gain X Strength this turn.

buffs.name: Blur
buffs.content: Block is not removed at the start of your next X turns.

buffs.name: Burst
buffs.content:
Your next X Skills are played an extra time this turn.
Notes: Removed at end of turn.

buffs.name: Corrosive Wave
buffs.content: Whenever you draw a card this turn, apply X Poison to ALL enemies.

buffs.name: Double Damage
buffs.content: For the next X turns, Attacks deal double damage.

buffs.name: Envenom
buffs.content: Whenever you deal unblocked attack damage, apply X Poison .

buffs.name: Fan of Knives
buffs.content: Shivs hit ALL enemies.

buffs.name: Free Skill
buffs.content: The next X Skills you play cost 0 .

buffs.name: Helical Dart
buffs.content:
Gain X Dexterity until the end of this turn.
Notes: Temporary Dexterity Gained when a Shiv is played. Mechanically identical to Speed Potion and Anticipate .

buffs.name: Infinite Blades
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, add X Shivs into your Hand.

buffs.name: Master Planner
buffs.content: When you play a Skill, it gains Sly.

buffs.name: Nightmare
buffs.content: Add X copies of a chosen card into your Hand next turn.

buffs.name: Phantom Blades
buffs.content: Shivs gain Retain . The first Shiv you play each turn deals X additional damage.

buffs.name: Serpent Form
buffs.content: Whenever you play a card, deal X damage to a random enemy.

buffs.name: Shadow Step
buffs.content:
For the next X turns after this one, Attacks deal double damage.
Notes: At the start of your turn, grants X Double Damage and is removed. It is possible to stack Shadow Step with Burst or Master Planner

buffs.name: Shadowmeld
buffs.content:
Double your Block gain this turn X times.
Notes: Removed at end of turn. Stacks multiplicatively (2^X multiplier).

buffs.name: Sneaky
buffs.content: Whenever another player attacks an enemy, gain X Block .

buffs.name: Speedster
buffs.content:
Whenever you draw a card during your turn, deal X damage to ALL enemies.
Notes: Only triggers on cards drawn outside the normal hand draw (e.g. from card effects).

buffs.name: The Hunt
buffs.content: Gain X additional card rewards at the end of combat.

buffs.name: Tools of the Trade
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, draw X cards and discard X cards.

buffs.name: Tracking
buffs.content: Weak enemies take X times more damage from Attacks.

buffs.name: Well-Laid Plans
buffs.content: At the end of your turn, Retain up to X cards.

buffs.name: Arsenal
buffs.content: Whenever you play a Colorless card, gain X Strength .

buffs.name: Black Hole
buffs.content: Whenever you spend or gain 1 , deal X damage to ALL enemies.

buffs.name: Child of the Stars
buffs.content: Gain X Block for each 1 spent.

buffs.name: Foregone Conclusion
buffs.content: Next turn, put X cards from your Draw Pile into your Hand.

buffs.name: Furnace
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, Forge X.

buffs.name: Genesis
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, gain 1 .

buffs.name: Hammer Time
buffs.content: Whenever you Forge , all allies Forge as well.

buffs.name: Monarch's Gaze
buffs.content: Whenever you attack an enemy, it loses X Strength this turn.

buffs.name: Monologue
buffs.content:
Whenever you play a card this turn, gain 1 Strength this turn.
Notes: Removed at end of turn. Strength gained is also removed.

buffs.name: Orbit
buffs.content: Every 4 you spend, gain X .

buffs.name: Pale Blue Dot
buffs.content: If you play 5 or more cards in a turn, draw X additional cards at the start of your next turn.

buffs.name: Parry
buffs.content: Whenever you play Sovereign Blade , gain X Block .

buffs.name: Pillar of Creation
buffs.content: Whenever you create a card, gain X Block .

buffs.name: Reflect
buffs.content: Blocked damage is reflected to your attacker for X turns.

buffs.name: Royalties
buffs.content: At the end of combat, gain X Gold.

buffs.name: Seeking Edge
buffs.content: Sovereign Blade now hits ALL enemies.

buffs.name: Spectrum Shift
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, add X random Colorless cards into your Hand.

buffs.name: Star Next Turn
buffs.content:
Gain X next turn.
Notes: Removed after triggering.

buffs.name: Sword Sage
buffs.content: Increase the cost of Sovereign Blade by X. Sovereign Blade now hits X additional times.

buffs.name: The Sealed Throne
buffs.content: Whenever you play a card, gain 1 .

buffs.name: Tyranny
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, draw X cards and Exhaust X cards from your Hand.

buffs.name: Void Form
buffs.content: The first X cards you play each turn are free to play.

buffs.name: Calcify
buffs.content: Osty's attacks deal X additional damage.

buffs.name: Call of the Void
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, add X random cards into your Hand and apply Ethereal to them.

buffs.name: Countdown
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, apply X Doom to a random enemy.

buffs.name: Danse Macabre
buffs.content: Whenever you play a card that costs 2 or more, gain X Block .

buffs.name: Demesne
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, gain and draw X additional cards.

buffs.name: Devour Life
buffs.content: Whenever you play a Soul , Summon X.

buffs.name: Die for You
buffs.content: Osty absorbs all unblocked attack damage.

buffs.name: Forbidden Grimoire
buffs.content: At the end of combat, remove X cards from your Deck.

buffs.name: Friendship
buffs.content: Gain at the start of each turn.

buffs.name: Haunt
buffs.content: Whenever you play a Soul , a random enemy loses X HP.

buffs.name: Lethality
buffs.content: The first Attack each turn deals X% additional damage.

buffs.name: Necro Mastery
buffs.content: Whenever Osty loses HP, ALL enemies lose X times that much HP as well.

buffs.name: Pagestorm
buffs.content: Whenever you draw an Ethereal card, draw X cards.

buffs.name: Reaper Form
buffs.content: Whenever Attacks deal damage, they also apply X times that much Doom .

buffs.name: Sentry Mode
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, add X Sweeping Gaze into your Hand.

buffs.name: Shroud
buffs.content: Whenever you apply Doom , gain X Block .

buffs.name: Sleight of Flesh
buffs.content:
Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, they take X damage.
Notes: Does not trigger from temporary debuffs.

buffs.name: Spirit of Ash
buffs.content: Whenever you play an Ethereal card, gain X Block .

buffs.name: Summon Next Turn
buffs.content:
At the start of your next turn, Summon X.
Notes: Removed after triggering.

buffs.name: Veilpiercer
buffs.content: The next X Ethereal cards you play cost 0.

buffs.name: Consuming Shadow
buffs.content: At the end of your turn, Evoke your X leftmost Orbs.

buffs.name: Coolant
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, gain X Block for each unique Orb you have.

buffs.name: Creative AI
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, add X random Powers into your Hand.

buffs.name: Echo Form
buffs.content: The first X cards you play each turn are played an extra time.

buffs.name: Feral
buffs.content: The first X times you play a 0 Attack each turn, return it to your Hand.

buffs.name: Focused Strike
buffs.content:
Gain X Focus until the end of this turn.
Notes: Temporary Focus Mechanically identical to Hotfix and Synchronize

buffs.name: Free Power
buffs.content: The next X Powers you play cost 0 .

buffs.name: Hailstorm
buffs.content: At the end of your turn, if you have Frost , deal X damage to ALL enemies.

buffs.name: Hello World
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, add X random Common cards into your Hand.

buffs.name: Hotfix
buffs.content:
Gain X Focus until the end of this turn.
Notes: Temporary Focus Mechanically identical to Focused Strike and Synchronize

buffs.name: Iteration
buffs.content: The first time you draw a Status card each turn, draw X cards.

buffs.name: Lightning Rod
buffs.content: At the start of the next X turns, Channel 1 Lightning .

buffs.name: Loop
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, trigger the passive ability of your next Orb X times.

buffs.name: Machine Learning
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, draw X additional cards.

buffs.name: Rebound
buffs.content:
The next X cards you play this turn are placed on the top of your Draw Pile.
Notes: Removed at end of turn.

buffs.name: Signal Boost
buffs.content:
Your next X Powers are played an extra time.
Notes: Loses 1 stack each time a Power is played an extra time.

buffs.name: Smokestack
buffs.content: Whenever you create a Status, deal X damage to ALL enemies.

buffs.name: Spinner
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, Channel X Glass .

buffs.name: Storm
buffs.content: Whenever you play a Power, Channel X Lightning .

buffs.name: Subroutine
buffs.content: Whenever you play a Power, gain X .

buffs.name: Synchronize
buffs.content:
Gain X Focus until the end of this turn.
Notes: Temporary Focus Mechanically identical to Focused Strike and Hotfix

buffs.name: Thunder
buffs.content: Whenever you Evoke Lightning , deal X damage to each enemy hit.

buffs.name: Trash to Treasure
buffs.content: Whenever you create a Status, Channel X random Orbs.

buffs.name: Automation
buffs.content: Every 10 cards you draw, gain .

buffs.name: Beacon of Hope
buffs.content: Whenever you gain Block on your turn, other players gain half that much Block X times.

buffs.name: Calamity
buffs.content: Whenever you play an Attack, add X random Attacks into your Hand.

buffs.name: Coordinate
buffs.content:
Gain X Strength until the end of this turn.
Notes: Temporary Strength Mechanically identical to Flex Potion , Reptile Trinket , Setup Strike , and Feeding Frenzy

buffs.name: Covered
buffs.content: An ally is covering you. All attacks that would be directed to you are redirected to them instead.

buffs.name: Curious
buffs.content: Powers cost X less.

buffs.name: Entropy
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, Transform X cards in your Hand.

buffs.name: Fasten
buffs.content: Gain an additional X Block from Defend cards.

buffs.name: Feeding Frenzy
buffs.content:
Gain X Strength until the end of this turn.
Notes: Temporary Strength Mechanically identical to Flex Potion , Reptile Trinket , Setup Strike , and Feeding Frenzy

buffs.name: Improvement
buffs.content: At the end of combat, Upgrade X random cards.

buffs.name: Intercept
buffs.content:
You are covering an ally. All attacks that would be directed towards them are redirected towards you.
Notes: Multiplayer only. Damage taken is multiplied by the number of players covered + 1. Removed at the end of the enemy turn.

buffs.name: Mayhem
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, play the next X top cards of your Draw Pile.

buffs.name: Nostalgia
buffs.content: The first X Attacks or Skills you play each turn are placed on top of your Draw Pile.

buffs.name: Panache
buffs.content:
If you play 5 more cards this turn, deal X damage to ALL enemies.
Notes: Counter resets to 5 each turn. Displayed amount shows cards remaining, not power stacks.

buffs.name: Prep Time
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, gain X Vigor .

buffs.name: Rolling Boulder
buffs.content: At the start of your turn, deal X damage to ALL enemies and increase this damage by 5.

buffs.name: Stratagem
buffs.content:
Whenever you shuffle your Draw Pile, choose X cards from it to put into your Hand.
Notes: Singleplayer only.

buffs.name: The Bomb
buffs.content: At the end of X turns, deal 40 damage to ALL enemies.

buffs.name: Toric Toughness
buffs.content: Gain N Block at the start of the next X turns.

buffs.name: Adaptable
buffs.content: When it would be defeated, it instead revives even stronger.

buffs.name: Asleep
buffs.content: Awakens upon losing HP or after X turns.

buffs.name: Back Attack
buffs.content: Deals 50% more damage when it is attacking you from behind.

buffs.name: Burrowed
buffs.content:
Block is not removed at the start of its turn. Stunned if all Block is removed.
Notes: Loses all Block when Burrowed is removed.

buffs.name: Crab Rage
buffs.content: When an ally dies, it gains 5 Strength and 99 Block .

buffs.name: Curl Up
buffs.content: Gains X Block upon first being hit.

buffs.name: Enrage
buffs.content: Whenever you play a Skill, gains X Strength .

buffs.name: Escape Artist
buffs.content: Tries to escape the combat after X turns.

buffs.name: Flutter
buffs.content: Receives 50% less damage from Attacks. Deal attack damage X times to Stun it.

buffs.name: Galvanic
buffs.content:
Powers are afflicted with Galvanized.
Notes: Applied innately by Globe Head at combat start. Afflicts all Power-type cards with the Galvanized affliction, which deals damage to the card's owner when played.

buffs.name: Gravity
buffs.content:
Whenever you play a card this turn, deal X damage to ALL enemies.
Notes: No known sources found in cards, relics, potions, or monsters. May be granted by an event or other mechanism.

buffs.name: Hard to Kill
buffs.content:
Reduce all damage taken and HP lost by it to 9.
Notes: Applied innately by Exoskeleton. Caps all damage instances to 9.

buffs.name: Hardened Shell
buffs.content:
It cannot lose more than X HP each turn.
Notes: Applied innately by Skulking Colony. Damage cap resets at the start of each player turn.

buffs.name: Hatch
buffs.content: Hatches after X turns.

buffs.name: Heist
buffs.content:
When killed, returns all the stolen Gold.
Notes: Applied to Fat Gremlin when Gremlin Merc dies (via Surprise power). Killing the Fat Gremlin returns stolen gold.

buffs.name: High Voltage
buffs.content:
At the start of its turn, it gains X Strength .
Notes: Applied innately by Zapbot.

buffs.name: Illusion
buffs.content: When this dies, it revives next turn at full HP.

buffs.name: Infested
buffs.content:
Upon dying, summons... something.
Notes: Spawns 4 Wrigglers on death.

buffs.name: Leadership
buffs.content: All other allies deal X additional damage.

buffs.name: Minion
buffs.content: Minions abandon combat without their leader.

buffs.name: Nemesis
buffs.content: At the end of every other turn, gains Intangible 1.

buffs.name: Painful Stabs
buffs.content: Shuffle X Wounds into your Discard Pile each time you receive unblocked attack damage.

buffs.name: Paper Cuts
buffs.content: Whenever it deals unblocked attack damage to you, you lose X Max HP.

buffs.name: Personal Hive
buffs.content: Whenever this enemy is hit by an Attack, add X Dazed into your Draw Pile.

buffs.name: Possess Speed
buffs.content: When killed, return all stolen Dexterity to the player.

buffs.name: Possess Strength
buffs.content: When killed, return all stolen Strength to the player.

buffs.name: Rampart
buffs.content: At the start of the player's turn, Turret Operator gains X Block .

buffs.name: Ravenous
buffs.content: When an enemy dies, Corpse Slug immediately eats it, becoming Stunned and gaining X Strength .

buffs.name: Reattach
buffs.content: If other segments are still alive, revives in 2 turns with X HP.

buffs.name: Sandpit
buffs.content:
In X turns, you will be eaten and die.
Notes: Applied to the player. Counts down each enemy turn. If it reaches 0, the player is killed.

buffs.name: Skittish
buffs.content:
The first time it is hit each turn, it gains X Block .
Notes: Only triggers once per turn. Resets at end of turn.

buffs.name: Slippery
buffs.content:
The next X times it loses HP, it only loses 1 HP instead.
Notes: Loses 1 stack each time it takes damage.

buffs.name: Slumber
buffs.content:
Awakens upon taking turns or losing HP X times.
Notes: Loses stacks from both taking damage and enemy turns ending. When removed, the Slumbering Beetle wakes up.

buffs.name: Soar
buffs.content:
Receives 50% less attack damage until it lands.
Notes: Only reduces damage from powered attacks. Does not stack.

buffs.name: Steam Eruption
buffs.content:
When killed, deals X damage at the end of your next turn.
Notes: Innate to Waterfall Giant . Accumulated through its moves. On death, the Giant becomes Stunned , then explodes for the full accumulated amount.

buffs.name: Stock
buffs.content:
When killed, a new Axebot is summoned in its place.
Notes: The new Axebot spawns with Stock reduced by 1. At 0, no further Axebots spawn.

buffs.name: Suck
buffs.content:
Whenever it deals unblocked attack damage, it gains X Strength .
Notes: Innate to Fossil Stalker .

buffs.name: Surprise
buffs.content:
Something is off about this creature...
Notes: When Gremlin Merc dies, a Sneaky Gremlin and Fat Gremlin are spawned.

buffs.name: Swipe
buffs.content:
Upon killing this enemy, the stolen card is returned.
Notes: Applied by Thieving Hopper when it steals a card. Each stolen card is a separate instance of Swipe.

buffs.name: Territorial
buffs.content: At the end of its turn, gains X Strength .

buffs.name: Thievery
buffs.content: Steals X Gold when Attacking.

buffs.name: Time Limit
buffs.content: You have X more turns to defeat the Battleworn Dummy.

buffs.name: Vital Spark
buffs.content: The first time it takes Attack damage each turn, the attacker gains .
